name: BBQ Flank Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the first eight ingredients in a bowl to make the basting sauce.
2. Place the flank steaks in a shallow pan (flank steaks are best if they are tenderized first).
3. Pour the sauce over the steaks, covering them well.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Remove the steaks from the basting sauce and cook them over the grill for about 3-5 minutes per side.
6. Baste with additional sauce as desired.
